name: Green Mountain Maple Barbequed Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the barbecue on medium-high heat.
2. In a small saucepan, stir together the maple syrup, chili sauce, vinegar, and mustard until well blended.
3. Brush the chicken with oil and season with salt and pepper.
4. Place the chicken on the barbecue.
5. Grill the chicken until cooked through, turning occasionally and brushing generously with the sauce, for about 10 minutes.
6. Serve immediately.
